findings.summary: Boundary violation: src/ports/index.ts imports the concrete adapter HttpSupportResistanceSource from src/adapters/node, violating layered architecture.
findings.suggested_fix: Remove `export { HttpSupportResistanceSource } from "../adapters/node/http-support-resistance-source.js";` from src/ports/index.ts. If the adapter needs to be exported, it should be done from a composition root or an index in the adapters layer, not from ports.
